Author: Endfish
Name: PosePad
Punchline: Quick pose, emote, expression, and Penumbra mod-action buttons.
Description: Open a pose button panel with /posepad. Includes common standing, sitting, lying, and other timeline-based poses alongside emotes, expressions, favorites, search, recent actions, a cancel-action button, and optional Penumbra integration that reads active modded emotes into a Mod Actions tab for faster GPose workflows.
